pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in verifier.py and task description
Explicitly defined in verifier.py and task description
Dynamically generated via ImageMagick in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Rocket.Chat instance and tasks the agent with updating the admin profile. All metadata parameters explicitly match the expectations in the verifier and setup scripts: the expected name is exactly 'IT Operations', the expected status is 'Monitoring Systems', and the generated avatar path is '/home/ga/it_avatar.png'.
